description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a dynamic design with a combination of dark gray and red accents. The upper is constructed from a mesh-like material for breathability, with synthetic overlays providing structure and durability. Two prominent red straps with black buckles cross the midfoot, offering a secure fit and a distinctive visual element. The midsole is thick and sculpted, with a textured, ribbed pattern for added grip and cushioning, while the outsole is rugged and designed for traction. Decorative circular elements and a pull tab at the heel enhance both style and functionality. The shoe appears new, clean, and structurally intact, suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A modern, dark gray athletic shoe with red accents, dual straps, and a thick, textured sole. Features include mesh panels, synthetic overlays, and a rugged outsole for urban activity.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, mesh upper, and two red straps with black buckles crossing the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted sole, red strap system, circular decorative element, and heel pull tab.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel pull tab, red heel accent, and the layered construction of the upper and sole.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the red straps, circular detail, and thick, ribbed sole.
